subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props source patterns
body:
Synchronized repo-tor CLAUDE.md with the glow-props canonical CLAUDE.md.
Added 7 REMINDER banners, 3 AI Notes (existing patterns, obsolete cleanup,
discontinued repos), 1 Prohibition (assumptions), Event Bus implementation
row, commit footer enforcement line. Updated wording, descriptions, and
file paths to match glow-props.

Tags: documentation, alignment, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
